questions.title: Given a 2D integer array mat[][] and a number x, find whether element x is present in the matrix or not.
questions.explanation: Traverse each row and column using nested loops and check if x exists.
questions.hint: Use nested loops and simple search

questions.title: Given an array arr, rotate the array by one position in clockwise direction.
questions.explanation: Move last element to front and shift remaining elements right.

questions.title: Given an array arr[]. Your task is to find the minimum and maximum elements in the array.
questions.explanation: Traverse array and track minimum and maximum values.

questions.title: You are given an array arr(0-based index) and two positive integer index and val. You need to insert an val at given index.
questions.explanation: Shift elements right and insert value or use insert method.

questions.title: Given an array arr of integers and an index key(0-based index). Your task is to return the element present at the index key in the array.
questions.explanation: Directly return arr[key].

questions.title: Given two arrays a[] and b[], your task is to determine whether b[] is a subset of a[].
questions.explanation: All elements of b must exist in a.

questions.title: Given an integer year. Print "True" (without quotes) if it can represent a leap year, otherwise print "False" (without quotes).
questions.explanation: Leap year rules: divisible by 4, not 100 unless 400.

questions.title: Given an array arr[], print all its elements space-separated.
questions.explanation: Traverse and print with space delimiter.

questions.title: Given an array arr of distinct elements, return an array of all elements except the two greatest elements in sorted order.
questions.explanation: Sort array and remove last two elements.

questions.title: Given two arrays of arr1 and arr2, calculate the product of the maximum element of arr1 and minimum element of arr2.
questions.explanation: Multiply max(arr1) by min(arr2).

questions.title: Count elements less than or equal to target and elements greater than or equal to target in a sorted array.
questions.explanation: Loop and count based on conditions.

questions.title: Divide array into two halves, sum each, and return their product.
questions.explanation: Use slice to split and sum() to aggregate.

questions.title: Find whether element x is present in array. Return first index or -1.
questions.explanation: Linear search for first occurrence.

questions.title: Find elements whose value equals its index (1-based indexing).
questions.explanation: Check if arr[i] == i + 1.

questions.title: Find last index of '1' in a binary string.
questions.explanation: Search string from the end.

questions.title: Given an NxN matrix, sort all its elements.
questions.explanation: Flatten matrix, sort list, then reshape.

questions.title: Count substrings that start and end with '1'.
questions.explanation: nC2 where n is number of 1s plus n.

questions.title: Count number of uppercase (Camel Case) characters in a string.
questions.explanation: Traverse and check isupper().

questions.title: Decrease one character from string after each line to form pattern.
questions.explanation: Print substrings of decreasing length.

questions.title: Find maximum extra amount given by replacing 6 with 9.
questions.explanation: Replace '6' with '9' and subtract original.

questions.title: Compute LCM and GCD of two integers.
questions.explanation: Use math.gcd then LCM = (a*b)//GCD.

questions.title: Calculate the median of an array.
questions.explanation: Sort array and find middle or average of middles.

questions.title: Round positive number to nearest multiple of 10 (smallest if equal).
questions.explanation: Look at last digit: <=5 round down, >5 round up.

questions.title: Divide each element by k and count total parts.
questions.explanation: Sum of ceil(element/k) for each element.

questions.title: Determine if possible to construct an integer divisible by 3 using all digits.
questions.explanation: Sum of all digits divisible by 3.

questions.title: Count cells in n*n matrix where i+j equals q (1-based index).
questions.explanation: Count satisfying pairs (i,j) such that 1<=i,j<=n.

questions.title: Find the digital root of n (recursive sum of digits until single digit).
questions.explanation: Keep summing digits until n < 10.

questions.title: Find the number of factors in N factorial.
questions.explanation: Use prime factorization of factorials.

questions.title: Return multiplication table of n from 1 to 10.
questions.explanation: Loop 1 to 10 and multiply.

questions.title: Find all numbers whose digits consist only of {1, 2, 3}.
questions.explanation: Check if set(str(n)) is subset of {'1','2','3'}.

questions.title: Find the shortest common supersequence of two strings.
questions.explanation: Minimum string containing both as subsequences.

questions.title: Minimum insertion steps to make a string palindrome.
questions.explanation: len(s) - LCS(s, reverse(s)).

questions.title: Determine if possible to reach last index in jump game.
questions.explanation: Maintain max reachable index.

questions.title: Find the longest palindromic substring in s.
questions.explanation: Search radially from each character.

questions.title: Partition Equal Subset Sum: can array be split into two equal sum subsets?
questions.explanation: Check if subset with sum total/2 exists.
